---
name: Adapter request
about: Request support for a new AI coding tool
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: ["adapter"]
assignees: []
---

## Tool

Name the tool and link its documentation or repository.

## Available signals

Check what the tool exposes:

- [ ] Hooks / webhooks
- [ ] JSON / NDJSON output
- [ ] Local logs or transcript files
- [ ] MCP / HTTP / WebSocket API
- [ ] Process-only fallback

## Useful paths or commands

List any known config/log paths, CLI flags, or hook examples.

## Why this matters

Explain the use case and what AISnitch should capture.
